mapper.sql: g.id, g.goods_name, g.goods_pic, g.category_id, g.sell_price, g.is_new, g.goods_status, g.stock, g.create_time, u.nickname as seller_nickname, c.category_name as category_name,u.user_pic as seller_pic
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO goods_image (goods_id, image_url, ext_info, create_time) VALUES
( #{goodsId}, #{image.imageUrl}, #{image.extInfo}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS sellerId, u.nickname AS sellerNickname, u.user_pic AS sellerAvatar, COUNT(g.id) AS publishGoodsCount FROM goods g INNER JOIN user u ON g.seller_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, u.user_pic
